title: System Components
productionRole: Prove system, capability, and roadmap components for complex pages.

pages.title: System Architecture Center
pages.takeaway: Architecture pages should connect inputs, a core platform, and outputs.

pages.title: Hub-Spoke Capability
pages.takeaway: Hub-spoke pages must explain relationships rather than decorate the page.

pages.title: Roadmap Swimlane
pages.takeaway: Roadmap swimlanes clarify stages, tracks, and the current marker.
